---
id: obtener-detalle-de-una-conversacion
title: "Get Conversation Detail"
description: "Retrieve the full detail of one conversation, including transcript, events, feedback, tags, metadata, and product memory."
sidebar_label: "Get Conversation Detail"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/ai-findr-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Conversation Detail"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/private/conversations/{conversationId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve the full detail of one specific conversation for analysis and investigation. It returns the chronological transcript, related feedback, analytics events, tags, metadata, and product memory recorded during the session.

**When to use it:**
Use this endpoint after identifying a relevant conversation from the conversations list. It is the last step in the analysis flow when you need to understand the exact case.

**Required headers:**
- `Authorization: Bearer {api_key}`
- `X-Organization-Id`

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"description":"Unique conversation identifier","in":"path","name":"conversationId","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
